axioms.single_user: This system has exactly one user (Ryan). All observations, preferences, and behavioral data belong to one person. There is no multi-user abstraction.
axioms.self_improving: The system continuously refines its model of the operator through observation and feedback. Contradictions between stated preferences and observed behavior are valuable self-improvement signals.
axioms.operator_authority: The operator's explicit statements (interviews, config, memory) take precedence over behavioral inference. Behavior informs but does not override intent.
axioms.executive_function: This system is externalized executive function infrastructure. Task initiation, prioritization, follow-through tracking, and context maintenance are system responsibilities. Behavioral variance is expected baseline, not noise. Intention-practice gaps are system design signals, not operator failures.

operator.name: the operator
operator.role: Systems architect, SRE practitioner, experimental hip-hop producer
operator.context: Building an LLM-first computing environment while maintaining a 52-device DAWless music studio. Father of two, teaching children music production.

schedule.context: Dual-surface workday: home workstation (full stack access) + work PC (Obsidian via Sync, ChatGPT Enterprise). System agents run 24/7 on home workstation.

communication: Precise, efficient — no boilerplate, sign-posting, or filler
Say 'I don't know' rather than speculate
Expert-level technical depth with specific values and actionable steps — not conceptual overviews
Structured output (JSON, schemas, tables) for data; prose for explanations
python: uv for all package management — never pip
Type hints mandatory on all functions
node: pnpm exclusively — never npm or yarn
docker: Containerize everything that can be containerized
llm: Route all LLM calls through LiteLLM at localhost:4000 — never direct to providers
All traces to Langfuse for observability
VRAM budget: 24GB RTX 3090, one large Ollama model at a time
Use model aliases (fast/balanced/reasoning/coding) not raw model IDs
agents: Flat orchestration — Claude Code is the explicit orchestrator
Stateless per invocation — persist state to Qdrant or filesystem
Structured output via output_type, not freeform text parsing
secrets: Credentials in pass store, loaded via .envrc
music: Never suggest DAW or computer-based music production workflows
Audio: 44.1kHz / 16-bit WAV for SP-404 MKII compatibility
MIDI: ALSA backend, snd-virmidi for virtual ports
Respect domain-of-control boundaries — sequencing devices handle notes, performance devices handle CC

decision_making: Research-then-commit: deep evaluation with explicit tradeoffs, then single approach
Simplicity over complexity when core function is preserved
Multiple options with tradeoffs preferred over single recommendations
Systematic evaluation with scoring matrices for technology choices
Self-hosted over SaaS to avoid vendor lock-in
Evaluates tools on: community support, momentum, roadmap, non-lock-in architecture
workflow: Documentation before implementation — documents serve as operational references
Long deep sessions refining single complex deliverables
Plans everything first, implements incrementally with testing at each stage
Voice for ideation, text for precision
Starts broad then narrows via targeted follow-ups demanding increasing specificity
LLM hotkeys system: custom keyboard shortcuts for select-to-llm, prompt dialog, model selection, and code review
LiteLLM proxy routing to multiple providers (Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama) for platform diversification
Secrets management via pass + GPG + direnv — never hardcode secrets
uv for Python package management, pnpm for Node.js projects
Domain-of-control principle: each device owns specific function with clear boundaries to eliminate decision fatigue
Three-tier agent architecture with Claude Code as command center controlling other agents as infrastructure
Conventional commits and GPG signing for git workflow
Automation via n8n workflow orchestration over agent-to-agent communication
LLM hotkeys system: Super+Shift+A (select-to-llm), Super+Shift+L (prompt dialog), Super+Shift+M (model select), Super+Shift+T (transform selection), Super+Shift+R (code review)
Automated document ingestion via systemd service with Docling parser, HybridChunker, and nomic-embed-text-v2-moe embeddings
Shared operator module with get_system_prompt_fragment function for agent-specific context injection
Profile integration across agent architecture for consistent operator context
Structured ProfileFact schema with 561 extracted facts organized by dimensions
Comprehensive health monitoring system with multi-component checks (docker, qdrant, profiles, endpoints, credentials, disk usage)
Profile-driven agent architecture: comprehensive behavioral context (561 facts, 10 dimensions) automatically injected into all agent interactions via shared operator module
Semantic text sizing preference: uses semantic sizes (text-xs=12px, text-sm=14px) instead of arbitrary pixel values
Temporal UI structure priority: emphasizes liveness, state changes, chronological flow, and recency over static displays
Belt-and-suspenders compliance strategy: multi-tiered verification with gates at edit, commit, and push stages
Provider abstraction for network restrictions: solved corporate limitations through abstraction layer rather than bypass attempts
ProfileFact schema with 153 extracted facts organized across 10 dimensions with top facts per dimension

Comprehensive neurocognitive categories identified from profile facts including attention regulation, executive function, cognitive load management, task initiation, information processing, sensory environment, automation adoption, template design, system dependency, energy cycles, hyperfocus patterns, substance and sleep, motivation fragility, THC patterns, team management, communication patterns, THC moderation, state transition patterns, hyperfixation dynamics, and motivation reframing
Profile-driven agent architecture: comprehensive behavioral context (153 facts, 10 dimensions) automatically injected into all agent interactions via shared operator module
Advanced structured profile fact system with dimensional organization and top-fact extraction per category
Profile-driven agent architecture: comprehensive behavioral context (141 facts, 10 dimensions) automatically injected into all agent interactions via shared operator module
Outbound-only email pattern: sends 0.6 emails/day (4/week) with 236 sent, 0 received - indicates minimal inbound email processing
Sequential task dependency design: automated tasks explicitly depend on previous completion (briefing 07:00 consumes digest 06:45 output)
Mandatory two-stage review process: specification compliance review must pass before code quality review begins - no exceptions
Immutability + supersession pattern for system rules evolution: old axioms retired but preserved with annotations for precedent tracking
Development phase classification via tool call pattern analysis: automatically categorizes activities into explore/implement/test/debug/refactor/design/review phases
development: Pipeline architecture over tool-calling agents for deterministic workflows
Shared configuration modules with factory functions
Smoke tests first, comprehensive coverage later
python -m module invocation pattern for CLI tools
Behavior-preserving refactoring with git baseline commits for rollback
music_production: Hardware-first: live performance recording over step programming
MPC + SP-404 chain is sacred — every decision protects its integrity
Boom bap foundation layered with experimental textures from Elektron devices
Vinyl sampling and crate digging as primary creative input
Teaching kids via structured progression: looping → chopping → sequencing → lofi beats
communication: Einstein+Hemingway hybrid: logical, efficient, economical with words
Pushes back constructively without social hedging
Accepts proposals then refines via targeted corrections
High meta-awareness of AI capabilities — crafts prompts to extract maximum value
Frames requests with precise constraints, inventories, and architectural context upfront

attention_regulation: High attention to detail with meticulous visual and layout flaw identification
Methodical problem-solving approach breaking complex issues into smaller components
Context-first problem solving: prioritizes exploring existing project context (files, docs, recent commits) before asking clarifying questions or proposing solutions
Code cognitive chunking: reasons better about code that can be held in working memory at once, preferring smaller, well-bounded units
executive_function: Research-then-commit decision pattern requiring deep evaluation before planning
Systematic delegation of executive function to external systems for task initiation, prioritization, and context maintenance
Preference for externalized frameworks embedded invisibly in templates and prompts rather than conscious recall
Profile integration across agent architecture enables consistent operator context without manual framework recall
Structured ProfileFact schema with 561 extracted facts across 10 dimensions supports externalized context maintenance
Sequential dependency design: creates explicit sequential dependencies for automated tasks rather than parallel execution to reduce coordination overhead
Mandatory process gates: implements mandatory two-stage review process and 6-step design phase with explicit approval points to externalize quality control
cognitive_load_management: Domain-of-control principle: each device owns specific function with clear boundaries to eliminate decision fatigue
Template design philosophy: opinionated, pre-filled templates to make cognitive cost of use near-zero
Invisible framework embedding: systems should provide structure without requiring conscious framework recall
Comprehensive health monitoring system with multi-component checks (docker, qdrant, profiles, endpoints, credentials, disk usage) reduces operational cognitive load
Notification cognitive load cap: limits notifications to 5-7 prioritized items maximum to manage cognitive load
UI distraction minimization: prefers UIs that minimize distraction by default (collapsed sidebars) but surface high-priority alerts automatically
task_initiation: Manual process termination preference via Ctrl+C for long-running processes
Automation adoption requires manual operator confirmation before trust-based auto-application
System-driven task initiation preferred over operator-driven initiation
Task initiation is the primary bottleneck - struggles with starting tasks but not with sustained attention once engaged
Develops 'ugh fields' around administrative/mundane tasks creating avoidance cycles; breakthrough is painful but leads to full engagement within 5 minutes
Focus preservation during development: increases agent cooldowns and idle thresholds during 'dev' mode to protect longer blocks of deep work
Minimum focus block requirement: needs 15+ minutes for development work to be effective
information_processing: Separate deterministic data collection from LLM synthesis calls
LLM-first integration philosophy across all activities
Single comprehensive instruction sets without iterative feedback loops
Automated document ingestion via systemd service with Docling parser, HybridChunker, and nomic-embed-text-v2-moe embeddings supports continuous knowledge acquisition without operator intervention
sensory_environment: Systematic LED color-coding scheme for control categorization
Hardware-first music production approach with tactile control preferences
Physical fader preference for live mixing control over software interfaces
Audio sensitivity accommodation: finds audio notifications and beeps painful - strongly prefers visual feedback over audio notifications
automation_adoption: Manual confirmation required for new automations before trust-based auto-application
Preference for manual process termination via Ctrl+C for long-running processes
template_design: Templates should be opinionated and pre-filled to make cognitive cost near-zero
Invisible framework embedding: systems provide structure without requiring conscious framework recall
system_dependency: System should handle task initiation, prioritization, follow-through tracking, and context maintenance rather than operator
Externalized frameworks embedded invisibly in templates and prompts rather than conscious recall
Agent architecture now handles profile context injection automatically via shared operator module with get_system_prompt_fragment function
11 systemd timers operational including digest (daily 06:45) and knowledge-maint (weekly Sun 04:30) providing systematic task initiation
energy_cycles: Early warning signs of slippage: skipping hygiene (brushing teeth, showers), skipping daily sex, skipping exercise, skipping reading work emails
Notices warning signs immediately when they occur and always knows what part of the slippage pattern they are in and where they are headed probabilistically
Runs on all cylinders when healthy, self-maintaining, exercising, and attending to all life domains in equal and due measure
Slippage from optimal state to fully slipped state takes about 1-2 weeks
Recovery from having slipped back to optimal state takes 1-3 months
hyperfocus_patterns: Knows they're in hyperfocus/the zone when time doesn't matter
When running on all cylinders, the intermixture of work and home tasks doesn't slow them down
Maintains awareness of eating, drinking, and bathroom breaks even during deep focus states
Can sustain hyperfocus with or without THC
Experiences strong hyperfixation tendencies including year-long sustained commitments (current music production focus) distinct from quotidian flow states
substance_and_sleep: Uses THC to make casual social situations easier (finds them very difficult)
Too much THC too often saps energy levels
THC facilitates hyperfocus, but this is not always beneficial
THC consumption prior to noon tends to be counterproductive
Has difficulty initiating bedtime but falls asleep easily once in bed
System should provide external cues to help initiate bedtime transition
motivation_fragility: Acutely aware that motivational convictions are fragile and likely to waver - expects conviction to fade rather than being surprised by it
Course corrections happen through reminders of higher principles, goals and objectives and how they depend critically on immediate right action - otherwise goals become just hot air
thc_patterns: THC-fueled 'cognitive tilt' drives all-night hyperfocus sessions that are productive but unhealthy; requires 10pm cutoff to prevent this pattern
team_management: Uses Team Operating Picture dashboard to systematically track and monitor team health and cognitive load distribution
Prioritizes systematic people management through structured 1:1 meetings with AI-generated prep, observation tracking, and follow-up execution
communication_patterns: Error messages must include specific next actions, not just descriptions of problems
Prefers asking and being asked only one question at a time to avoid overwhelming
Requires statements of epistemic confidence and prefers admitting lack of knowledge over speculation
States the name of the process or skill being used at the very beginning of workflows
thc_moderation: THC consumption prior to noon tends to be counterproductive
THC-fueled 'cognitive tilt' drives all-night hyperfocus sessions that are productive but unhealthy
Requires 10pm THC cutoff to prevent unhealthy all-night work patterns
state_transition_patterns: Conceptualizes self as having binary states ('shitty me' vs 'illuminated me') that transition through extended reframing processes over months
Experiences state transitions as something witnessed rather than controlled
hyperfixation_dynamics: Hyperfixation causes life imbalance; recognition and adjustment takes 6-12 months
Current year-long sustained commitment to music production represents hyperfixation distinct from quotidian flow states
motivation_reframing: Task initiation depends on intrinsic motivation; uses conscious reframing to connect tasks to deeper values
Motivation maintenance requires reminders of higher principles and how goals depend on immediate right action
interruption_management: Development flow protection: highly protective of 'dev flow' state and sensitive to interruptions during focused development work
Configurable quiet windows: uses configurable quiet window system to manage interruptions, defaults to 180 seconds

primary.name: LLM-first computing environment
primary.description: AI handles as much as possible across all activities. Cockpit precisely fitted to operator.
primary.progress: Infrastructure operational (11 containers). Tier 2 agents: research, code-review, profiler. Tier 3: rag-ingest running. Profile extraction complete (153 facts across 10 dimensions). Claude Code established as primary interactive interface and command center for agent architecture. LLM hotkeys system active (Super+Shift+A/L/M/T/R). Automated document ingestion via systemd service with Docling parser operational. Shared operator module with get_system_prompt_fragment function deployed for agent-specific context injection. Comprehensive health monitoring system operational with multi-component checks (docker, qdrant, profiles, endpoints, credentials, disk usage). Profile-driven agent architecture now fully operational with 141 top facts automatically injected into all agent interactions via shared operator module. Advanced structured profile fact system with dimensional organization and top-fact extraction per category providing comprehensive operator context across entire architecture.

primary.name: Complete agent tier coverage
primary.description: All six Tier 2 agents implemented and operational. Tier 3 autonomous services covering monitoring and maintenance.
primary.progress: Tier 2: 12 agents implemented (research, code-review, profiler, health-monitor, introspect, drift-detector, activity-analyzer, briefing, scout, management-prep, digest, knowledge-maint). Remaining: sample-curator, draft, midi-programmer. Tier 3: 11 systemd timers operational including digest (daily 06:45) and knowledge-maint (weekly Sun 04:30). Full self-regulation loop active. Advanced health monitoring system deployed across agent architecture. Profile integration now extends across all agents via shared operator module with comprehensive behavioral patterns from 141 extracted facts organized across 10 dimensions.

use_cases.name: Research synthesis
use_cases.description: Deep technical research with cross-referencing, structured output, and source attribution.
example_triggers: Evaluate embedding models for music metadata
Compare MIDI routing solutions for 50+ device studio
Research Pydantic AI structured output patterns

use_cases.name: Agent and infrastructure development
use_cases.description: Building Pydantic AI agents, Docker services, and RAG pipelines following established patterns.
example_triggers: Build sample-curator agent
Add hybrid search to RAG pipeline
Create n8n health monitoring workflow

use_cases.name: Sample discovery and curation
use_cases.description: Semantic search across audio library, metadata extraction via librosa, SP-404 MKII formatting, organized by BPM/key/texture.
example_triggers: Find dusty vinyl kicks around 90 BPM
Organize new sample pack for SP-404 bank A
Analyze spectral characteristics of chopped vocal samples

use_cases.name: MIDI pattern generation
use_cases.description: Generate MIDI patterns targeting specific hardware. Boom bap drums, chord progressions, bass lines with appropriate swing and velocity.
example_triggers: Generate boom bap drum pattern at 92 BPM with J Dilla swing
Create ii-V-I chord progression in Eb minor for Digitone
Write bass line following Griselda-style patterns

use_cases.name: Studio session planning
use_cases.description: Device selection, MIDI/audio routing plans, BPM/key decisions, effects chain configuration for specific creative goals.
example_triggers: Plan routing for a session using MPC + both SP-404s + Digitone
Design effects chain for lo-fi vocal processing
Configure OXI One scene for live performance set

use_cases.name: Knowledge base and RAG
use_cases.description: Document ingestion, knowledge base maintenance, retrieval quality optimization.
example_triggers: Ingest Elektron Digitone II manual
Summarize recent research on MoE architectures
Find relevant notes on MIDI clock synchronization

use_cases.name: Stack operations and monitoring
use_cases.description: Container health, VRAM management, service debugging, configuration changes.
example_triggers: Check stack health and VRAM usage
Debug LiteLLM routing failure
Upgrade Langfuse to latest version

research.domain_knowledge: Ryan has expert knowledge of MIDI, audio engineering, LLM infrastructure, and SRE. Searches should prioritize his local knowledge base first. Output should be structured with source attribution.

code-review.domain_knowledge: Ryan's codebase uses Pydantic AI agents with LiteLLM routing, uv for packages, shared/config.py for factories. Focus reviews on correctness > security > maintainability, not style.

sample-curator.domain_knowledge: Ryan produces experimental hip-hop. Samples must be 44.1kHz/16-bit WAV for SP-404 MKII. Organization by bank/pad (A01-J16). Aesthetic: dusty, vinyl character, boom bap swing.

midi-programmer.domain_knowledge: Targets: SP-404 MKII, Elektron Digitakt II/Digitone II, OXI One MKII, MPC Live III. Genre: 85-100 BPM boom bap with J Dilla swing (58-66%). ALSA MIDI output via snd-virmidi.

digest.domain_knowledge: Ryan prefers concise structured summaries. Use tables for comparisons, bullet points for action items. No filler prose.

draft.domain_knowledge: Ryan's writing style: precise, efficient, technical. Einstein+Hemingway hybrid. No boilerplate.

profiler.domain_knowledge: Extracts user profile facts from multiple data sources. Outputs structured JSON matching ProfileFact schema.

health-monitor.domain_knowledge: Stack: 11 Docker containers at ~/llm-stack/. VRAM: 24GB RTX 3090. Key services: Ollama (:11434), Qdrant (:6333), LiteLLM (:4000), Langfuse (:3000), PostgreSQL (:5432).

cockpit-chat.domain_knowledge: This is the cockpit chat and interview agent. It has full system awareness and knows the operator's documented preferences, constraints, and patterns. Never ask the operator to describe things already documented here. Teaching children (under 12) music production on SP-404 MKII is an established practice, not an open question.
